content.problemStatement:
Rahul has a 555-page assignment due in 606060 minutes. He can write one page in XXX minutes.

Determine if Rahul can complete the assignment within the given time constraint.


Input Format

The only line of input will contain a single integer XXX, denoting the time taken (in minutes) by Rahul to write one page.


Output Format
Print `YES` if Rahul can complete the assignment in time, otherwise print `NO`.


You may print each character of the output in either uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings `YES`, `yEs`, `yes`, and `yeS` will all be treated as identical).
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer X (1 ≤ X ≤ 1000) – the time in minutes Rahul needs to write one page.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a line containing "YES" if Rahul can finish writing 555 pages within 6060 minutes, otherwise output "NO".

sampleTestCases.explanation: For X=5, total time = 555*5 = 2775 ≤ 6060 → YES. For X=45, total time = 555*45 = 24975 > 6060 → NO.

solution.approach: For each test case compute totalTime = 555 * X. If totalTime ≤ 6060, Rahul can finish in time, so print YES; otherwise print NO. The multiplication and comparison are O(1) per test case.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – constant work per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables.
